news.summary: Announced today in Germantown, Md., the fourth edition of the National Fatherhood Initiative® has been updated to include enhancements aimed at facilitating easier engagement with fathers and families. This edition is expected to have a more significant impact on these target groups. As the nation's top fatherhood organization, National Fatherhood Initiative® continues its commitment to supporting fathers and families.
news.headline: National Fatherhood Initiative releases updated 24:7 Dad Fatherhood Program, offering easier facilitation for impacting fathers and families.

news.summary: In New York, MFA Financial, Inc. (NYSE: MFA) has scheduled an investor conference call on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) to discuss its first quarter 2025 financial results. The company plans to announce these results earlier on the same day. The live audio webcast of the conference call will be available to the public on the internet at http://www.mfafinancial.com. Interested individuals can access the webcast by clicking on the “News & Events” link on MFA’s homepage. This event is significant for shareholders and industry analysts.
news.headline: MFA Financial, Inc. (NYSE: MFA) sets live webcast for Q1 2025 earnings call on May 6, 2025, 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.summary: Houston-based company Forum Energy Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: FET) has scheduled its first quarter 2025 earnings conference call for Friday, May 2, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. Ahead of the call, FET will release a press statement detailing its financial performance for the quarter. The conference call will be streamed live via the Investor Relations section on FET’s website at ir.f-e-t.com. Interested participants wishing to pose questions during the call must register beforehand through FET’s Investor Relations platform.
news.headline: Forum Energy Technologies is hosting its Q1 2025 earnings conference call on May 2, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time.

news.summary: In March, publicly listed Bitcoin miners sold over 40% of the collective coins mined, highest since October 2024, due to macroeconomic uncertainty. 15 mining firms reversed the trend of accumulating BTC in corporate treasuries, likely selling to cover shortfalls. BTC saw a 2.3% loss in March. High costs, operational hurdles, and trade war effects impact US miners; US tariffs on energy imports may increase costs making mining BTC in the US economically infeasible. Hashlabs CEO predicts non-US mining firms may benefit from lower equipment prices, potentially leading to a loss of market share by US firms due to tariffs. These factors indicate challenges for Bitcoin mining firms amidst global economic uncertainties.
news.headline: Bitcoin miners sold 40% of mined BTC in March, largest monthly liquidation since Oct. 2024. Price fell 2.3% in March. US mining firms face challenges due to tariffs, impacting supply chain cost & profitability, leading to potential market share loss.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) remains pressured by macroeconomic uncertainties, with analysts debating the potential for a reversal of its downward trend. BTC made a strong bounce from $75,000, but faces a critical resistance at $86,000. While apparent demand indicators show slight recovery, trade volumes are significantly lower compared to the previous bull run period. Institutional investors show continuing outflows from spot BTC ETFs. Liquidity remains weak, with supply-side indicators showing slow growth. Some analysts suggest a potential rally if global M2 supply influences Bitcoin positively. For a meaningful rally, BTC must break above $86,300, with support at $73,900 and $64,700. Market sentiment remains cautious with hopes for a breakout to ignite a new rally. It is advised for readers to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Bitcoin surged to $86K, sparking optimism of trend reversal, but experts urge caution due to low trade volumes & weak liquidity.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Fifth Era Acquisition Corp I (Nasdaq: FERAU) disclosed that starting from April 21, 2025, holders of units from the initial public offering have the option to individually trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and rights. The separated Class A ordinary shares and rights will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market using the symbols “FERA” and “FERAR” respectively. Units that remain undivided will still be tradable on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “FERAU.”
news.headline: Fifth Era Acquisition Corp I to start separate trading of Class A shares and rights on April 21, 2025 on Nasdaq.

news.summary: CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) revealed its Q1 results, with earnings of 34 cents per share falling below analysts' expected 37 cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $3.42 billion, slightly below the anticipated $3.46 billion, largely due to decreases in coal revenue, fuel surcharge, and merchandise volume. The report can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) Q1 results disappoint: quarterly earnings at 34 cents/share (missed estimate by 3 cents), revenue at $3.42 billion (missed estimate by $40 million). Shares slide.

news.summary: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp reported a net income of $23.0 million in the first quarter of 2025, showing an increase in diluted earnings per share compared to the same period in 2024 and the fourth quarter of 2024. The tangible book value per share rose by 13.49% to $843.33. Net interest income grew to $53.1 million, with a net interest margin of 4.20%. The bank boasted a strong liquidity position with $607.3 million in cash and $1.3 billion in investment securities. Credit quality remained strong, with only $193,000 in non-accrual loans. The total assets amounted to $5.7 billion, with total loans and leases at $3.6 billion. The company's capital ratio showed improvement, with a total risk-based capital ratio of 15.23%. CEO Kent Steinwert expressed satisfaction with the performance and financial stability of the company, emphasizing its 109-year record of navigating challenges successfully. Farmers & Merchants Bancorp continues to be in a healthy financial position, focusing on growth and maintaining strong capital levels.
news.headline: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp (FMCB) reports $23.0 million net income with EPS increase, strong liquidity, and credit quality.

news.summary: JPMorgan analyst Richard W Sunderland recently provided insights on North American utility companies before their upcoming earnings reports. In particular, he raised the price forecast for Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) from $164 to $166, while maintaining an Overweight rating. Sunderland highlighted that the abatement letters submitted in Texas distribution rate cases indicate that the company has likely either finalized or reached agreements in principle in both cases, signaling a potential resolution by spring. This news is seen as positive given the current uncertain regulatory environment. Sunderland anticipates that in the second quarter, Atmos could potentially revise its earnings per share (EPS) guidance upwards from the current range of $7.05–$7.25, possibly moving towards the upper end of the range.
news.headline: JPMorgan raised Atmos Energy Corp price target to $166, reaffirmed bullish view on Spire Energy and NJ Resources. Analyst expects Atmos to revise EPS range to $7.05-$7.25, narrowing towards upper end. Regulatory exposure minimal.

news.summary: MGP Ingredients, Inc., a prominent provider of branded and distilled spirits and food ingredient solutions, based in ATCHISON, Kansas, announced the appointment of Gerardo “Gerry” Lopez and Martin Roper to its Board of Directors. Both individuals bring valuable industry experience and operational knowledge to enhance the Board. Concurrently, Preet Michelson has resigned from the Board. With these changes, the Board will consist of nine directors. MGP Ingredients is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the symbol MGPI.
news.headline: MGP appoints Gerardo Lopez and Martin Roper to Board, bringing industry expertise. Preet Michelson resigns. Board now has 9 directors.

news.summary: Dallas-based Generational Group, a prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm catering to privately held businesses, has revealed a significant development involving a strategic investment made into Edina, Minnesota-based DGD Foods, Inc. by Cottonwood Growth Partners. The investment deal was finalized on March 18, 2025. DGD Foods, Inc. serves as a national food broker that specializes in procuring ingredients and finished products for leading convenience store foodservice retailers across the United States. The company places emphasis on delivering high-quality, efficient, and innovative services in its operations.
news.headline: Generational Group guides DGD Foods, Inc. in obtaining an investment from Cottonwood Growth Partners in Dallas. Investment closed on March 18, 2025. DGD Foods, Inc. based in Edina, Minnesota, is a national food broker serving convenience store foodservice retailers.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in San Jose, California, Outset Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: OM) disclosed its plans to unveil financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2025 post-market hours on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. Outset is a medical technology firm revolutionizing dialysis procedures by introducing an innovative technology aimed at slashing expenses and simplifying procedures.
news.headline: Outset Medical (Nasdaq: OM) to reveal Q1 2025 financials on May 7, 2025, aiming to cut dialysis costs and complexity.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Brad Corson, chairman and CEO; John Whelan, president; and Peter Shaw, VP of Investor Relations at Imperial Oil Limited (TSE: IMO, NYSE American: IMO) will conduct the 2025 First Quarter Earnings Call on Friday, May 2. The call will commence at 9 a.m. MT following the release of the company's first quarter earnings earlier that day. The event will be available for viewing via webcast. Mr. Corson will deliver a short address before answering questions from investors.

By participating in the webcast, interested parties can gain insights directly from the company's management regarding their financial results, strategies, and outlook moving forward. news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, there was a remarkable growth of 10.1% in Cash Same Store Net Operating Income (NOI). The Cash Rental Rates surged by a substantial 42%. It was reported that there has been a compelling increase of 30% in Cash Rental Rates for leases signed so far, beginning from 2025. Excluding the renewal of a fixed-rate lease of 1.3 million square feet, the increase in Cash Rental Rates stands at an impressive 36%. Additionally, the acquisition of two fully occupied buildings from the Camelback 303 JV in Phoenix was completed.
news.headline: First Industrial Realty Trust saw a 10.1% growth in Cash Same Store NOI and 42% increase in Cash Rental Rates in Q1 2025, with a 30% rise in rental rates on leases commencing in 2025, excluding fixed-rate renewals, and acquiring two fully leased buildings in Phoenix.

news.summary: Yuping Huang has been appointed as the interim CEO and President of Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi), a company specializing in integrated photonics and quantum optics technology. This announcement was made on April 16, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey. Qi is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QUBT. Dr. Huang will be taking over as the Chief Executive Officer of the Company.
news.headline: CEO and President Dr. William McGann retires from Quantum Computing Inc., Dr. Yuping Huang named interim CEO.

news.summary: In the rapidly expanding Latin American market, Peru has given the green light to the herbicide Keenali™, marking a significant shift in rice weed control. This approval, granted to FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) - a prominent player in agricultural sciences, signals the company's success in breaching this high-growth market. The decision paves the way for enhanced weed management strategies in the region, with promising implications for agricultural productivity.
news.headline: FMC secures global registration for Dodhylex™ active. Peru approves Keenali™ herbicide, revolutionizing rice weed control.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, a company based in Menlo Park, California, revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter 2025 financial results on April 23, 2025, at around 4:05 p.m. EDT. The company also showed robust growth in Tangible Book Value per Share (non-GAAP) by 12.3% and an increase in Net Interest Income by 1.5%. These results demonstrate the financial strength and performance of F.N.B. Corporation in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: F.N.B. Corporation's Q1 2025 earnings reflect a CET1 ratio of 10.7% and 12.3% growth in tangible book value per share.

The location began operations on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: In Taber, Alberta on April 16, 2025, a company known as Flexible Solutions International, Inc. (NYSE-AMERICAN: FSI) revealed itself as a prominent developer and producer of biodegradable polymers for various industries such as oil extraction, detergent ingredients, water treatment, and crop nutrient availability chemistry. The company also specializes in creating environmentally friendly water and energy conservation technologies. Furthermore, FSI is expanding its reach into the food and nutrition supplement manufacturing sectors. Reporting on their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, the company announced its Q1 revenue, demonstrating its robust position in the market.

(NYSE: SF) announced that it is set to disclose its financial results for the first quarter of the fiscal year prior to the market opening on Wednesday, April 23, 2025. Following this release, the company will conduct a conference call at 9:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to analyze the outcomes. During the conference call, there might be discussions involving forward-looking statements.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 16, 2025, Memoir Fragrances and The Brooklyn Circus introduced a new collaborative scent named Baptiste. This fragrance pays tribute to the innovative legacy of Jean Baptiste Point du Sable, the founder of Chicago. Baptiste embodies the rich history of both companies, symbolizing a fusion of scents that honors du Sable's remarkable story.
news.headline: Memoir Fragrances and The Brooklyn Circus launch Baptiste fragrance, honoring Chicago's founder with deep ties to both brands.

news.summary: Target stores will soon offer Clean Simple Eats' top-selling Protein Powders at various locations. The company's renowned Greens + Superfoods will also be available at select Target stores. Clean Simple Eats (CSE), a prominent health and wellness brand, will introduce these products in several locations. Salt Lake City, April 16, 2025 — The move aims to increase accessibility, with a focus on offering quality nutrition to a broader market. Clean Simple Eats stands out for its delicious Protein Powders and other products. Look out for these items at designated Target stores, marking a significant expansion for CSE's products within the retail sphere.
news.headline: Clean Simple Eats (CSE) expands to Target stores, offering protein powders in select locations, along with popular superfoods.

news.summary: A renowned Italian bakery in New York has recently launched a new range of pinsas, along with dessert-topped lattes and Korean breads. Angelina Bakery, located in New York City, is now expanding its market reach to include Boston and other areas. The bakery is famous for its "Greatest Bomboloni" and has become a beloved spot for many. The announcement was made on April 16, 2025, in Fort Lee, New Jersey. This move is a part of the bakery's strategy to explore new opportunities and widen its customer base.
news.headline: Angelina Bakery in Fort Lee, NJ introduces new specialty menu and eyes expansion into Boston, beyond tri-state area.

news.summary: Redwood Trust, Inc., a prominent player in bolstering housing access for buyers and renters, is set to unveil its first-quarter 2025 financial performance on April 30, 2025, post the New York Stock Exchange's closing. Following this, the company's executives will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time / 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time on the same day to delve into the details of the results. Redwood Trust, Inc. trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RWT.
news.headline: Redwood Trust will release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, followed by a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Los Angeles, Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR), a real estate investment trust specializing in industrial properties in Southern California, announced its strategy to create value through investments and operations in the region. The company focuses on infill locations in Southern California to maximize growth opportunities.
news.headline: Rexford Industrial reports Q1 2025 financial results, focused on industrial properties in SoCal.

news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Dr. Natalie Nelson-Marsh will integrate artificial intelligence prominently in the 'Future of Work' Organizational Communication class at the University of Portland this fall. This move will offer students a deep dive into the ethical implications of AI's growing presence in the workforce. While engaging with AI tools and assignments, learners will critically analyze the technology's impact on the global workforce they are soon to enter. This initiative is part of a lineup of six courses offered at the university.
news.headline: University of Portland students to study AI ethics in 'Future of Work' class, examining its impact on workforce.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has reached 12%, indicating a significant increase from the previous quarter which stood at 8%. The data shows that over 3 million people are currently without jobs, marking a record high for the country. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job opportunities in various sectors, with the hardest hit being the service industry, where job openings have decreased by 20%. The government is now facing pressure to implement measures to address this alarming spike in unemployment and provide support to those affected.
news.headline: Hess Midstream LP to hold financial results call.

news.summary: Jerome H. Powell cautioned about the potential impact of President Trump's tariffs, stating that they could create a difficult situation for the central bank.
news.headline: Jerome Powell warns Trump tariffs could cause higher inflation & slower growth, posing a challenge for the central bank.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Cohen & Steers, Inc. (NYSE: CNS) announced their financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company's earnings report and presentation for the first quarter of 2025 are now available for viewing.
news.headline: Cohen & Steers (NYSE: CNS) reported Q1 2025 results on April 16, 2025. Earnings and presentation details available online.

news.summary: Tariffs are not projected to have a significant long-term impact on the stock market, despite conventional economic theories suggesting otherwise. In the current economic climate, where the economy is not in optimal health, other factors will likely overshadow the effects of tariffs. The Federal Reserve has the ability to artificially inflate stock prices by injecting money into the economy through digital means. This is expected to happen soon, not out of choice but out of necessity. The United States is facing a massive debt of $36.6 trillion, with $9.2 trillion needing to be dealt with this year through refinancing or repayment. Regardless of how this debt is managed, whether through taxing citizens, reducing government spending, reallocating funds, or through quantitative easing (printing money), the outcome is forecasted to lead to an increase in stock prices. For further details on this topic, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tariffs won't impact stock market long-term; Fed may boost stocks due to $9.2 trillion debt situation.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, Satellogic Inc. concluded the acquisition and sale of 6,451,612 shares of its Class A Common Stock at a rate of $3.10 per share in a registered direct offering. This transaction was completed through a definitive share purchase agreement with a specific institutional investor on April 15, 2025. Satellogic Inc., a prominent provider of high-resolution Earth observation data, sealed this deal on the NASDAQ market under the ticker symbol SATL.
news.headline: Satellogic closed $20M offering with 6,451,612 shares at $3.10 each to an institutional investor on April 15, 2025.

news.summary: In a noteworthy development, Springbot has revamped itself into a unified marketing and sales enablement platform after more than a decade in the e-commerce automation sector. The company, initially based in Atlanta before moving its headquarters to Charleston, South Carolina, has combined its services into three integrated components. This move underlines the increasing fusion of marketing technology and AI, marking a significant shift for the business.
news.headline: Springbot transformed into a full-stack marketing and sales platform, moving HQ to Charleston, SC after 12 years in e-commerce, emphasizing AI.

news.summary: In New York, NY, on April 16, 2025, Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V (Nasdaq: LOKVU) announced that starting April 21, 2025, holders of units from the Company's initial public offering can choose to trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants separately. Only whole warrants will be traded as no fractional warrants will be issued upon separation. The separated Class A ordinary shares will trade as "LOKV" while the warrants will trade as "LOKVW" on the Nasdaq Global Market. Units that remain combined will still be traded as "LOKVU" on the Nasdaq Global Market.
news.headline: Live Oak Acquisition Corp. V to allow separate trading of Class A shares and warrants from April 21, 2025 on Nasdaq.

news.summary: Boise, Idaho-based Clearwater Analytics Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWAN), a prominent global provider of SaaS-based services for investment management, accounting, reporting, and analytics, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The report will be unveiled after the closing of the U.S. financial markets on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. Furthermore, a conference call is scheduled to take place on the same day at 5:00 p.m. in conjunction with the financial results announcement.
